components.text:
Hi {{1}}, this is your last reminder from TBWX 🧇

The old franchise price of *₹1.5 Lakhs + GST* closes *tomorrow, 18th May at midnight*.

After tomorrow:
❌ Price moves to ₹4–7 Lakhs
❌ No extensions, no exceptions

If you want to lock in at the old price, today is the day.

Reply YES now and we'll get your agreement out within hours.
Closes midnight 18th May. Reply STOP to opt out.
